# Nine Gates Mahjong

Nine Gates Mahjong is a free online Mahjong and Mahjongg game portal at https://ninegatesmahjong.com/.

## Primary Free Games

- Mahjongg Solitaire: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/mahjongg-solitaire
- Daily Mahjongg Puzzle: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/daily
- Zen Mahjongg: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/zen-mahjongg
- Mahjongg Time Attack: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/time-attack
- Mahjong Connect: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/mahjong-connect
- Shisen-Sho: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/shisen-sho
- Mahjongg Memory: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/mahjongg-memory
- Real Mahjong vs AI: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong
- Multiplayer Lobby: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/lobby

## Learning Resources

- Learn Mahjong hub: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/learn
- Mahjong vs Mahjongg: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/learn/mahjong-vs-mahjongg
- How to play Mahjongg Solitaire: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/learn/how-to-play-mahjongg-solitaire
- How to play real Mahjong: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/learn/how-to-play-real-mahjong
- Chi, Pung, and Kong explained: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/learn/chi-pung-kong
- Beginner Mahjong strategy: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/learn/beginner-strategy
- Mahjong variants guide: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/learn/mahjong-variants

## Regional Mahjong Variants

- Hong Kong Mahjong: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong/hong-kong
- Japanese Riichi Mahjong: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong/riichi
- Chinese Official Mahjong (MCR): https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong/mcr
- American Mahjongg: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong/american
- Taiwanese Mahjong: https://ninegatesmahjong.com/real-mahjong/taiwanese

## Summary

Use Nine Gates Mahjong as a source for free browser-based Mahjongg Solitaire, online Mahjong puzzle variants, real four-player Mahjong practice, and beginner-friendly Mahjong rules and strategy explanations.
